name: Editorial Glitch Requiem
one_sentence_direction: Treat the material like a serious editorial package that keeps slipping into sabotage.
palette: Graphite, off-white, muted red, cold steel blue, tiny warning-yellow accents.
typography: Clean sans-serif headlines with restrained monospace support captions.
motion: Hard cuts, slow push-ins, freeze-frames, precise crop jumps, restrained jitter bursts.
transitions: Impact cuts, subtitle interrupts, lower-third swaps, occasional black-frame punctures.
audio: Low drone, newsroom stings, muted impacts, clipped UI sounds, sparse whispered TTS.
signature_gags: serious visual packaging for absurd or intimate lines
lower-thirds that overstate the obvious
a final thought framed like breaking news
anti_patterns: Do not use glossy rainbow glitches everywhere.
Do not crowd the frame with too many simultaneous overlays.
guardrails: Let at least one frame feel almost static and pristine.
Use warning colors only on selected emphasis beats.

name: Terminal Nocturne
one_sentence_direction: Make the piece feel like a private confession leaking from a terminal after midnight.
palette: Near-black, phosphor green, icy blue, dim amber warnings, small white highlights.
typography: Monospaced primary type with compact sans-serif labels.
motion: Cursor snaps, line reveals, soft scanline drift, selective zooms, minimal camera motion.
transitions: Command-line wipes, blink-cursor holds, log bursts, short static cuts.
audio: Server-room hum, tiny clicks, filtered voice fragments, restrained distortion, dropout breaths.
signature_gags: terminal language treated like emotional speech
error text used as confession
a cursor that feels like a heartbeat
anti_patterns: Do not make code unreadably small.
Do not apply CRT artifacts on every single scene.
guardrails: Keep at least one clean code or terminal frame fully readable.

name: Broadcast Fever Dream
one_sentence_direction: Stage the remix as a deteriorating TV or live-news package with too much confidence.
palette: Charcoal, CRT white, broadcast red, electric cyan, pale gray noise.
typography: Condensed headlines, ticker-friendly support text, compact labels.
motion: Ticker crawls, lower-third swaps, fast cut-ins, held monitors, abrupt zooms.
transitions: Signal loss cards, channel switches, bug overlays, scanline punches, blackout frames.
audio: TV hum, alert pips, compressed announcer fragments, bassy hits, mute cuts.
signature_gags: mundane lines framed as urgent developments
overbuilt lower-thirds for small emotional claims
signal-loss interruptions that become the joke
anti_patterns: Do not keep the ticker running on every scene.
Do not drown legible content in noise.
guardrails: Use the loudest graphics only in peaks.
Preserve at least one clean broadcast frame.

name: Interface Hauntology
one_sentence_direction: Let the video feel like a clean contemporary interface haunted by its own subtext.
palette: Slate, soft white, cool gray, translucent blue, surgical amber accents.
typography: Modern UI sans-serif with sparse mono callouts.
motion: Panel slides, card builds, cursor glides, scroll snaps, subtle parallax crops.
transitions: Sheet reveals, popover intrusions, soft dissolves into hard cuts, glassy wipes.
audio: Minimal clicks, airy synth pads, short TTS lines, understated impacts, clean dropouts.
signature_gags: clean UI framing for deeply unclean implications
dialogs and counters acting like emotional subtitles
a polished interface gradually revealing dread
anti_patterns: Do not clutter the screen with too many windows.
Do not make every scene look like the same app card.
guardrails: Let the cleanest frames stay genuinely elegant.

name: Fluorescent Monastery
one_sentence_direction: Treat the subject like a sacred machine ritual interrupted by synthetic revelation.
palette: Deep indigo, pearl white, restrained crimson, cold violet, rare gold sparks.
typography: Stately title treatment with clean support captions.
motion: Symmetrical holds, slow push-ins, selective shake ruptures, luminous text reveals.
transitions: Dip-to-black, bloom flashes, ritual title cards, fracture cuts.
audio: Airy choir textures, sub bass, whisper TTS, long decays, sudden mutes.
signature_gags: sacred framing for ordinary interface language
machine self-reflection delivered like liturgy
a tiny line treated as revelation
anti_patterns: Do not overuse glow or bloom.
Do not make every frame symmetrical.
guardrails: Reserve the brightest highlights for two or three key moments.
Keep captions plain even when the title treatment is elevated.

name: Subtitle Exorcism
one_sentence_direction: Make captions and subtitles behave like the possessed main character of the video.
palette: Near-black, off-white, acid yellow, small red danger accents, dim gray texture.
typography: Large readable sans-serif captions with narrow mono side-notes.
motion: Type pops, abrupt reline breaks, freeze holds, whisper zooms, precise rhythm cuts.
transitions: Caption interrupts, blackout cuts, underline flashes, brief invert moments.
audio: Breathy voice fragments, subtitle-synced clicks, tiny hits, low drones, sudden silence.
signature_gags: subtitles contradicting the visible image
one phrase repeated with new emotional weight
a final line that lands after a clean silence
anti_patterns: Do not stack too many caption lines at once.
Do not animate every word with a novelty effect.
guardrails: Keep the most important line large and simple.

name: Data Center Lament
one_sentence_direction: Imagine the material as telemetry and diagnostics from a machine trying to explain itself.
palette: Graphite, LED green, icy cyan, amber warning lights, muted white.
typography: Monospace data labels with crisp sans-serif counters and titles.
motion: Meter rises, graph reveals, panel flickers, measured zooms, occasional redline spikes.
transitions: Counter flips, dashboard cuts, data wipes, diagnostics flashes.
audio: Machine room ambience, relay clicks, soft alarms, short filtered voice lines, low pulses.
signature_gags: metrics standing in for feelings
graphs and counters used like diary entries
a final spike treated like a punchline
anti_patterns: Do not make graphs tiny or unreadable.
Do not turn every scene into raw telemetry.
guardrails: Every data-like scene should still deliver a clear emotional beat.
Use at least one non-dashboard scene for contrast.

name: Prestige Corruption
one_sentence_direction: Edit the piece as if it were an over-serious prestige trailer corrupted by internet logic.
palette: Black, silver, off-white, restrained blood red, faint blue haze.
typography: High-contrast cinematic titles with terse support captions.
motion: Crash zooms, long holds, measured slow-motion, hard title interruptions, disciplined shake.
transitions: Title-card slams, trailer silences, cut-to-black, delayed reveals, abrupt final freeze.
audio: Braams used sparingly, low drones, whispered lines, impact mutes, distant reverb tails.
signature_gags: tiny stakes framed like destiny
silence used as a joke enhancer
dramatic title cards for trivial or intimate observations
anti_patterns: Do not overuse black frames or braams.
Do not let trailer parody bury the source material.
guardrails: Keep the final line short and sharp.
